title: lolium temulentum var. arvense
intro: Lolium temulentum var. arvense, also known as the false oats or darnel, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lolium temulentum var. arvense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies in the form of dried flowers and leaves.
